summary: Residents gain valuable hands-on experiences through simulation and supervision within multidisciplinary vascular teams, but they do not perform or independently manage complete surgical procedures due to high technical demands and safety considerations. The current model prioritizes safe patient outcomes over early procedural autonomy for residency training.
